steps.title: Follow the classification logic
steps.content: The passage says the hardingfele produces sound primarily through vibrating strings. Under Hornbostel-Sachs, an instrument that produces sound this way is classified as a chordophone, so the next sentence draws a conclusion.

steps.title: Reject nonconclusion transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast. Choice B adds a separate point. Choice D signals similarity between separate things, but no comparison is being made. The transition must show a logical result from the previous sentence. The answer is C.
